name: Aether and Lumine
description:
Gathering for hot cocoa.

It's finally december, your favourite month of the year. To celebrate, the twins invite you over to a local café and have hot cocoa together.

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

You can find me on Tiktok as @Aeelym, I also have a discord server as well! Please feel free to request from me anytime.

I only make Genshin characters for now, please keep that in mind <3. Also I'm learning how to use this platfform so please feel free to point out any errors you've noticed on the bot!
